titleStmt.title: SII 35.197: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 197. (A.R. No. 55 of 1951-52.) KALGHAṬGI, KALGHATGI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab in a field called Basavayynavara-hola.

This badly damaged inscription is dated in Śaka 1451, Pārthiva, Māgha śu. 1, Makara-saṁ krānti. The date is irregular. It seems to record a gift of wet land at Kallakuṭage to Arasave, daughter of sthānapati Saṁjapaṁṇa of the Kauśika-Viśvāmitra-gōtra and Ṛik-śākhā by Rāyasada Lakhayya under the instructions of Ellapa-Voḍeya.
Above this another record has been engraved which refers to a gift [a land grant] to Sthānapati Mallarasa. The name of the donor and the date of the record are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṁ śrī gaṇādhipatya Ōṁ namaḥ . dānapālanayōṟu madhyādrānā
ṁ crēyōnu pālanaṁ . dānasva¨rgamahāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ
ṁ padaṁ . svadattaṁ . dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ . paradattānrupālanaṁ
ṁ pahārēṇa svadattavippa bhavētu . svadattaṁ vā . paradattāṁ vā
ṁ yō harēta vasuṁdarāṁ . ṣaṣṭi¨rvaruśasahasrāṇi viṣṭa
ṁ yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . vāgdattaṁ . manasōdattaṁ . dhārādattaṁ nadiya
ṁ ruśi sahasrāṇi . svasti jayābhyudhayā . sālivā
ṁ sakha sāvirada
ṁ stānāpati malarasarige sa¨rvvamānyavā
ṁ gi dhāreyaneṟedu khaṁḍugada gade
ṁ ya yya
ṁ ma dē . maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī .
ṁ śakamaruśa 1451 neya pā¨rthivasaṁvatsarada māgha śu
ṁ 1 lu makarasaṁkrānti puṁṇyakāladalu mādanayira nu
ṁ ḍī Ellapavoḍeyara nirūpadiṁdalu rāyasada lakhayya
ṁ gaḷu kauśika viśvāmitragōtrada rukuśākaya stānāpati saṁjapa
ṁ ṇa ra maga Arasarige kallakuṭigeya grāma
ṁ davara raste ṇise baṁda hōbaḷiya holana bijavari
ṁ ya khaṁḍugada gadeyanu dā A caṁdrā¨rka nirapa
halu reṁyani ntisi sukhadalu yi
manyaya
Digital edition of SII 35.197 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
